title: Shinhye Kim
text:
Faculty directory observation
Name: Shinhye Kim
Snapshot: 2026-07-21
published_titles: Albert T. and Sarah F. Brout Professor of Business
education_entries: Ph D in Marketing, Washington State University
MS in Marketing Communication, Illinois Institute of Technology
BBA in Business Administration and Dutch, Hankuk University of Foreign Studies
research_interests: Customer Relationship Management Customer Participation Management Sales Management Business Model Innovation
teaching_interests: Marketing Management Data Analytics Marketing Research Consumer Behavior Customer Centric Marketing Management
publications: Journal Article, Academic Journal (2024). Retweet to Donate? Corporate Donation Campaigns in the Era of Social Medialization . European Journal of Marketing. Volume, 58. Issue, 4. Pages, 1015-1046.

Journal Article, Academic Journal (2023). Doing good by sharing messages: An investigation of “You Share, We Donate” campaigns and how they can attain viral success . Journal of Business Research. Volume, 156. Issue, 113510.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2022). Prepayment, Uncertainty and Cross-Buying Behaviors: Budgeting Effects on Future Purchasing Behavior . Marketing Letters. Volume, 33. Pages, 415-439.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2022). A Lure or A Turn-off: Social Media Reaction to Business Model Innovation Announcements . Marketing Letters. Volume, 34. Pages, 13-33.

Journal Article, Academic Journal (2019). Why and When Witnessing Uncivil Behavior Leads Observers to Punish Frontline Employees and Leave the Firm . International Journal of Hospitality Management. Volume, 82. Pages, 91-100.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2019). The Ultimate Co-creation: Leveraging Customers’ Input in Business Model Innovation . AMS Review. Volume, 9. Issue, 3. Pages, 339-356.
